title: Greedy Mobs
description: Makes monsters able to pick up items all the time.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hvExpEX3?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&color=%2319c819) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1242212171472048288?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=%23266fff)

Makes it so mobs are able to pick up items all the time. (Only some monsters are capable of picking up items in vanilla)

![Skeleton picking up diamond chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac09888be559902b56bfd4276a0c7982049b89c7.gif)
### Note
**Don't expect many updates** as there's not much you can add to a datapack like this. I will try my best to update it to newer versions.
